transcript.clean_text: stage three of the tour of Aman taking the Riders from the seaside at shatti Al karum to kurat a tough finish with possible Crosswinds and an uphill rise the pelaton rolling out and Ben o Conor not taken to the race start for Dimension data 10 Riders racing clear including the gold J of prean Van Hecker on search for more points the riders in the lead group extended their advantage approaching seven minutes at one point and behind the echelon started to form the wind blowing from the right hand side and the strong Classics men appearing at the front including the red jersey of Alexander Kristoff approaching the Bell three Riders clear including bonario and also the teammate of preon Van Hecker helping him along behind Alexi lenko using attack as the best form of Defense slowly but surely the Breakaway reeled in with two escapes left out in front with 15 km to go bonao and prean Van hecka but they were reeled in by The pelaton Who who set themselves up for the final climb many riders couldn't keep Pace with the Crosswinds playing Havoc with the rest of the chase Christoff was still there in the red jersey 2 km to go and finally his legs gave out the Norwegian putting in a fierce defense of his lead the pace making was ferocious and finally yesterday's winner Alexi lenko went clear a powerful attack leaving pots of Evo in his wake two wins in two days for the man from estana Alexander Kristoff loses the red jersey lenko wins the stage by 1 second and he takes red he'll see you tomorrow
